mapper.update: update batch.pipeline_definition set pipeline_name = #{pipeline_name}, pipeline_type = #{pipeline_type}, biz_type = #{biz_type}, worker_group = #{worker_group}, enabled = #{enabled}, description = #{description}, updated_at = current_timestamp where tenant_id = #{tenant_id} and id = #{id}
mapper.delete: delete from batch.pipeline_definition where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and id = #{id}
mapper.select: select job_code as code, pipeline_name as name from batch.pipeline_definition where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and enabled = true order by job_code asc
